button.name: action_post
button.invisible: state == 'draft' and not auto_post and move_type == 'entry'

button.name: action_post
button.invisible: state == 'draft' and not auto_post and move_type != 'entry'

button.name: action_register_payment
button.invisible: state == 'posted' or payment_state in ('not_paid', 'partial') or move_type in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'in_invoice', 'in_refund', 'out_receipt', 'in_receipt')

div.invisible: move_type in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund') or not invoice_has_outstanding or payment_state in ('not_paid', 'partial')

form.div:
You have
outstanding payments
for this customer. You can allocate them to mark this invoice as paid.

div.invisible: move_type in ('in_invoice', 'in_refund') or invoice_has_outstanding or payment_state in ('not_paid', 'partial')

form.div:
You have
outstanding debits
for this vendor. You can allocate them to mark this bill as paid.
This move is configured to be posted automatically at the accounting date:.

widget.name: web_ribbon
widget.tooltip: This entry has been generated through the Invoicing app, before installing Accounting. It has been disabled by the 'Invoicing Switch Threshold Date' setting so that it does not impact your accounting.

div.span: The current highest number is. You might want to put a higher number here.

field.name: partner_id
invoice_line_ids
field.context: {'default_move_type': context.get('default_move_type'), 'journal_id': journal_id, 'default_partner_id': commercial_partner_id, 'default_currency_id': currency_id or company_currency_id}

list.default_order: sequence, date desc, move_name desc, id

field.name: product_id
field.domain: context.get('default_move_type') in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'out_receipt') and [('sale_ok', '=', True), '|'] or [('purchase_ok', '=', True), '|', ]

div.span: This entry has been generated through the Invoicing app, before installing Accounting. Its balance has been imported separately.

field.name: line_ids
field.context: {'default_move_type': context.get('default_move_type'), 'line_ids': line_ids, 'journal_id': journal_id, 'default_partner_id': commercial_partner_id, 'default_currency_id': currency_id or company_currency_id}

list.default_order: sequence, date desc, move_name desc, id

xpath.div: Proposition of tax closing journal entry.

field.name: help
field.p: A journal entry consists of several journal items, each of which is either a debit or a credit transaction.
